author: Josh Larkin, CementOps AI
fail_safe: If this file cannot be loaded, DEFAULT TO STOP_WORK
notes: Every rule maps to a 30 CFR section. Keywords are broad to minimize false negatives. The agent MUST use check_stopwork.py to evaluate — it does NOT make stop-work decisions on its own.

rules.condition: Unguarded moving machine parts within reach of personnel
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Unguarded moving machine parts within reach of personnel. Do not resume until guards are installed, inspected, and verified. Notify your supervisor and safety manager NOW. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14107(a).

rules.condition: Fall hazard — unprotected edge or opening above 6 feet
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Fall hazard: unprotected edge or opening. Do not approach. Do not resume until fall protection (guardrails, harness, or covers) is in place and verified. Reference: 30 CFR 56.15005.

rules.condition: Energized equipment — lockout/tagout not applied during maintenance
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Equipment not properly locked out/tagged out during maintenance. All energy sources must be isolated and verified before work continues. Contact your supervisor NOW. Reference: 30 CFR 56.12016.

rules.condition: Confined space entry without permit or atmospheric testing
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Confined space entry without proper permit and atmospheric testing. EXIT THE SPACE IMMEDIATELY if safe to do so. Do not re-enter until a confined space permit is issued and atmosphere is tested and verified safe. Reference: 30 CFR 56.5002.

rules.condition: Active ground instability or structural failure risk
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Ground or structural instability detected. Evacuate the area. Establish a safety perimeter. Do not re-enter until a qualified person has assessed and cleared the area. Reference: 30 CFR 56.3200.

rules.condition: Hazardous atmosphere — oxygen deficient, enriched, or toxic gas detected
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Hazardous atmosphere detected. Move to fresh air immediately. Do not re-enter until atmosphere is tested and verified safe by a competent person with calibrated instruments. Reference: 30 CFR 56.5001.

rules.condition: Arc flash or electrical flash hazard — work near energized electrical panels without PPE
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Arc flash / electrical flash hazard. Close the panel and step back. Do not open or work on energized electrical equipment without proper arc-flash-rated PPE and a qualified electrician present. Reference: 30 CFR 56.12025.

rules.condition: Kiln shell hot spot — potential shell breach or refractory failure
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Kiln shell hot spot / potential refractory breach detected. Evacuate the area around the kiln shell. Do not walk under or near the affected zone. Notify kiln operator and maintenance supervisor. Kiln may need emergency shutdown. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14100(a).

rules.condition: Molten clinker or hot material spill in personnel area
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Molten/hot clinker or material spill in personnel area. Evacuate immediately. Establish exclusion zone. Do not attempt to clean up until material has cooled and area is assessed safe. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14100(a).

rules.condition: Dust concentration at or above explosive limit (LEL)
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Combustible dust at or above explosive concentration. Evacuate the area. Eliminate all ignition sources. Do not operate electrical equipment in the zone. Notify the control room and fire response team. Reference: 30 CFR 56.4201.

rules.condition: Mobile equipment operating without backup alarm or in blind spot with personnel present
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Mobile equipment operating near personnel without functioning backup alarm or spotter. Stop equipment movement. Clear all personnel from the area. Do not resume until backup alarms are verified working and spotters are in place. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14132(a).

rules.condition: Crane or hoist operating over personnel or with defective rigging
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Crane/hoist operating over personnel or with defective rigging. Lower the load to a safe position if possible. Clear all personnel from under and around the load. Do not resume lifting until rigging is inspected and all personnel are clear. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14211.

rules.condition: Scaffold without inspection tag or structurally deficient
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Scaffold is not inspected, tagged, or is structurally deficient. Do not use the scaffold. Barricade the area. Do not resume until a competent person has inspected, repaired, and tagged the scaffold safe. Reference: 30 CFR 56.11027.

rules.condition: Chemical spill — acid, caustic, or hazardous material release
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Hazardous chemical spill or release. Evacuate the immediate area. Do not attempt cleanup without proper PPE and training. Notify your supervisor and follow your plant spill response plan. Reference: 30 CFR 56.20014.

rules.condition: Fire or active combustion in plant area
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Fire or active combustion detected. Activate fire alarm. Evacuate the area. Do not attempt to fight the fire unless trained and it is safe to do so. Notify the control room and emergency response team. Reference: 30 CFR 56.4200.

rules.condition: Excavation or trench without shoring, sloping, or protective system
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Excavation or trench without proper shoring or protective system. All personnel exit the trench immediately. Do not re-enter until shoring, sloping, or a trench box is installed and inspected by a competent person. Reference: 30 CFR 56.3401.

rules.condition: Person trapped, pinned, or caught in equipment
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. EMERGENCY RESCUE SITUATION. Do NOT attempt to reverse the equipment — you may cause further injury. Hit the emergency stop. Call 911 / plant emergency number. Keep the victim calm and still. Do not move them unless there is immediate danger to life. This is a medical emergency.

rules.condition: Electrical ground fault or stray current detected
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Electrical ground fault or stray current. Do not touch the affected equipment. De-energize the circuit if you can do so safely from a remote breaker. Barricade the area. Do not re-energize until a qualified electrician has investigated and repaired the fault. Reference: 30 CFR 56.12025.

rules.condition: Pressure vessel or compressed gas leak
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Pressure vessel or compressed gas leak. Evacuate the area. Do not attempt to tighten fittings or stop the leak while under pressure. Isolate the pressure source if you can do so safely from a remote valve. Notify maintenance and your supervisor. Reference: 30 CFR 56.13020.

rules.condition: Blasting area — unauthorized personnel in blast zone
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Unauthorized personnel in blast zone or blasting without proper clearance. All personnel evacuate to safe distance. Do not proceed with any blasting until area is cleared, guards are posted, and proper blast signals are given. Reference: 30 CFR 56.6306.

rules.condition: Preheater buildup collapse or blockage with personnel in exposure zone
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Preheater buildup/blockage with personnel in exposure zone. Buildup collapses are unpredictable and can release tons of hot material instantly. Evacuate all personnel from below the blockage and from the cleanout area. Do not attempt to rod or poke the blockage with personnel positioned below or in the path of falling material. Notify the control room and kiln operator. Reference: 30 CFR 56.3200.

rules.condition: Hydraulic injection injury — high-pressure fluid penetrating skin
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. MEDICAL EMERGENCY — suspected hydraulic injection injury. This is a SURGICAL EMERGENCY even if the wound looks minor. Do NOT apply heat, do NOT massage the area, do NOT wait. Call 911 and get the injured person to an emergency room with surgical capability IMMEDIATELY. Inform the ER it is a hydraulic fluid injection injury — they may not recognize it. Time to surgery is critical. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14100(a).

rules.condition: Kiln coating ring or buildup collapse inside kiln during operation
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Kiln coating ring or buildup collapse detected. This can cause kiln shell deformation, dust storm in the cooler area, and hot material surge through the cooler. Evacuate personnel from the kiln hood, cooler, and clinker handling areas. Notify the control room. Kiln may require controlled shutdown. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14100(a).

rules.condition: Personnel entering clinker cooler undergrate while cooler is hot or not fully isolated
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Personnel in clinker cooler undergrate area without full isolation and cooldown. Cooler undergrate temperatures can exceed 500C. Material can fall through grate plates without warning. EXIT IMMEDIATELY if safe to do so. Cooler must be fully shut down, cooled, locked out, and atmospherically tested before entry. Reference: 30 CFR 56.14100(a).

rules.condition: Uncontrolled quicklime (CaO) contact with water — exothermic reaction
rules.message: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Uncontrolled quicklime (CaO) and water reaction. This is a violent exothermic reaction that produces extreme heat, steam, and caustic calcium hydroxide. Evacuate the area. Do not attempt to add more water — it will intensify the reaction. Do not touch the material — it causes severe chemical burns. Allow the reaction to complete, then clean up with proper PPE (chemical suit, respirator, face shield). Reference: 30 CFR 56.20014.
